name: Turkey Ranchero
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup lowfat yogurt or sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each turkey thigh in half using a sharp knife; remove the bone and skin.
2. Place the cut turkey thighs in the crockpot.
3. Combine the enchilada sauce mix with tomato paste and water in a bowl until it forms a thick mixture.
4. Spread the thickened sauce evenly over the turkey thighs.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 to 8 hours, or until the turkey is tender.
6. Turn off the crockpot and switch to HIGH heat.
7. Add grated Monterey Jack cheese to the cooked turkey and stir until melted.
8. Spoon the mixture into an au gratin dish or shallow casserole.
9. Spread yogurt over the top of the turkey.
10. Sprinkle sliced green onions on the dish.
11. Top with crushed corn chips.
